arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target Nico Williams issues telling statement on his future
arts.sum: Nico Williams has emerged as a top target for Arsenal for this summer's transfer window, but the Spain international has now sparked concern for Mikel Arteta by speaking out on his future

arts.ttl: Barcelona star limps out of Celta Vigo clash with injury, a week out from Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Saturday been dealt an altogether concerning blow on the personnel front. This comes owing to developments in the club’s meeting with Celta Vigo. Barcelona…

arts.ttl: ‘Three simple things’ – Real Madrid questions continue after Arsenal victory
arts.sum: For any Arsenal fans who aren’t quite finished revelling in the win over Real Madrid this week, a read of Marca will provide particularly enjoyable reading. The Spanish press has not gone easy on Carlo Ancelotti’s side after Arsenal’s win at the Bernabeu, with questions being asked left, right and centre about what went wrong. The post ‘Three simple things’ – Real Madrid questions continue after Arsenal victory appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Sunday’s home match against Athletic Bilbao in La Liga. Camavinga is available.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: THREE summer signings finalised - including Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: In addition to Alexander-Arnold, Real Madrid are set to bring back two familiar faces to the club. Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold is the most prominent of Los Blancos’ new additions, with the 26-year-old arriving as the starting right-back for next season.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti staunchly defends Real Madrid after Champions League exit, “Questioning a club that has won so many titles in the last decade seems misleading”
arts.sum: However, when asked multiple times about his future, he kept his answer intentionally vague: “We’ll talk at the end of the season.” We have a final in a week’s time, we have the first Club World Cup in history at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti hints at Real Madrid exit talks after Jurgen Klopp's response to job links
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti has been linked with an exit from the Bernabeu in recent months and the Italian has now confirmed talks over his future are pencilled in

arts.ttl: Arrigo Sacchi Defends Carlo Ancelotti: “Do They Even Know Who He Is?”
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid sporting director Arrigo Sacchi has come to Carlo Ancelotti’s defense. Drawing on his own experience as Real Madrid’s technical director from December 2004 to December 2005, Sacchi offered insight into the club’s inner workings—particularly the way club president Florentino Pérez operates.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano reveals Liverpool have the edge over Real Madrid in £50m transfer battle
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided an update on the futures of three key players at Bournemouth ahead of this summer, including Liverpool target Dean Huijsen. The Reds are alongside Chelsea, Arsenal and Newcastle United in targeting Huijsen, who is available for £50m due to a release clause in his contract. That’s according to Romano’s latest information […] The post Fabrizio Romano reveals Liverpool have the edge over Real Madrid in £50m transfer battle appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Carlo Ancelotti won't discuss future amid renewed Brazil links
arts.sum: We have one [the Copa del Rey final] in a week, and we have the first ever Club World Cup at the end of the season, it wouldn't be right to do it now," Ancelotti said. "At the end of the season, I'll talk about that with the club," Ancelotti said.
